case_title: CHANH P QUACH VS. CLAIRE IANDOLI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-31-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-31-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,706.97 FILED BY QUACH, CHANH P AS TO DEFENDANT IANDOLI, CLAIRE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-27-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT IS "APPROVED", AND TRIAL CONTINUED TO JAN-31-2012 AT 1:30 PM, DEPT.# 506 -PER JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO DEPT. 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE FILED BY DEFENDANT IANDOLI, CLAIRE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-31-2013 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUACH, CHANH P RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IANDOLI, CLAIRE $2,790.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,840.00, DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. REQUEST GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. (JUDGMENT ENTERED ON: JANUARY 31, 2013).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-31-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
